verbatim_text: Okay. And so whenever you see this AI-generated logo up in the corner, we're going to be talking about this hypothetical. The impact, of course, of doing an agent like this or perhaps any of these other scientific disciplines is very large. In this case, the impact would be if we solve nuclear fusion or something similarly ambitious, we could get clean energy forever, et cetera. And we're going to need a couple of things to build this. The first is we're going to need specialized reasoning. Second, we're going to need this agent to be able to gather data and learn from its data. And third, we're going to need this agent to be able to experiment and iterate, like how a scientist does, and update its priors and so forth. Great. So this brings me to the outline of my research.
